role: Sustainability Consultant
---

# Consultant (Practice Owner)

This entity represents the practice owner as they appear in meeting transcripts — typically as the author of action items, the facilitator of client calls, or the named owner of deliverables. It is distinct from `consultant-practice` (the firm-level consultant entity) and exists so that signals extracted from transcripts (e.g., "Consultant will draft the TCFD narrative by Friday") link to a profiled node rather than an unresolved stub.
